name: presidio-psy
description: Presidio Psy jam-compliant mobile-first 3D web game scaffold.

scripts.audit:bundle: npm run build && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');const path=require('node:path');const root='dist';if(!fs.existsSync(root)){throw new Error('dist not found');}const walk=(dir,prefix='')=>fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true}).flatMap((entry)=>entry.isDirectory()?walk(path.join(dir,entry.name),prefix+entry.name+'/'):[{name:prefix+entry.name,size:fs.statSync(path.join(dir,entry.name)).size}]);const stats=walk(root);const total=stats.reduce((acc,f)=>acc+f.size,0);console.log('dist files:',stats.length);for(const f of stats){console.log(' - '+f.name+': '+f.size+' bytes');}console.log('total bytes:',total);"
